message.content:
[Wed 2026-04-08 20:51 EDT] Forward this structured Gmail intake to Polly context and return a one-line ACK.

INTAKE_PAYLOAD:
{
  "source": "Maxwell",
  "mailbox": "lhyman@gmail.com",
  "swept_at_utc": "2026-04-09T00:50:27Z",
  "threads_scanned": 120,
  "new_threads": [],
  "counts": {
    "new_total": 0,
    "urgent": 0,
    "today": 0,
    "this_week": 0,
    "fyi": 0,
    "spam_or_noise": 0
  },
  "policy": {
    "outbound_email_sent": false,
    "mailbox_mutations": false
  }
}

If no handoff channel is available, output: "ACK: Intake received for Polly (no direct handoff channel)."

content.text: ACK: Intake received for Polly (no direct handoff channel).
